prInfo.title: [GRT-6907] - test: [BE] 코드 정리 - 통합 테스트 작성
prInfo.body:
### 개요
 - [[GRT-6907](https://doodlin.atlassian.net/browse/GRT-6907)] - [BE] 코드 정리 - 통합 테스트 작성



### 작업 내용
 - 몇몇 주요 기능에 대한 통합 테스트 추가
 - BaseIntegrationTest 분리
   - jUnit과 kotest의 생명주기가 일부 달라서 context가 꼬이는 문제가 있어 BaseIntegrationTest 분리
 - [ApplicantsServiceImpl.kt](https://github.com/doodlincorp/greeting-new-back/compare/feature/GRT-6907-integration-test?expand=1#diff-df4abe06cff6f42c42194fce3ff562b7f1e0be778255cacf7ae145b329f4f64c)에 Transactional Annotation 추가
   - 기존에 상위 Facade쪽에서 Transactional이 있어서 기능상 이슈는 없어보이고, TC 작성 시 해당 작업에 Transactional이 없어서 상태 변경이 되지 않는 부분이 있어 추가
   - 물론 TC가 아니더라도 Service 독립 기능상 Transactional이 있는 것이 맞아서 추가한 부분도 있음



### 체크리스트
- [x] 빌드 확인
- [x] 테스트 통과




### 추가 유의사항
 - 조금은 단순화되어 작성된 것들이 있어보여서, 이 부분들은 추후에 케이스 등을 더 추가하면서 보강하면 될 거 같아요.




[GRT-6907]: https://doodlin.atlassian.net/browse/GRT-6907?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiNWRkNTljNzYxNjVmNDY3MDlhMDU5Y2ZhYzA5YTRkZjUiLCJwIjoiZ2l0aHViLWNvbS1KU1cifQ
prInfo.author: dongseop-lee-doodlin

+import software.amazon.awssdk.services.secretsmanager.SecretsManagerClient
+
+/**
+ * JUnit 5 기반 통합 테스트 Base 클래스.
+ * MockBean 정의는 [IntegrationTestMockConfig]에 중앙화되어 있다.
+ * 각 테스트 메서드 실행 전 DB/MongoDB를 초기화한다.
+ */
+@SpringBootTest(classes = [RootTestConfig::class])
+@ActiveProfiles("integration-test")
+@ContextConfiguration(initializers = [TestContainersInitializer::class])
+@Import(IntegrationTestMockConfig::class)
+abstract class BaseJunitIntegrationTest {
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var normalizedFeignClient: NormalizedFeignClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var authorizationClient: AuthorizationClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var integrationFeignClient: IntegrationFeignClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    internal lateinit var recruitApplicantFeignClient: RecruitApplicantFeignClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var openGraphClient: OpenGraphClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var programmersOAuth2FeignClient: ProgrammersOAuth2FeignClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var programmersFeignClient: ProgrammersFeignClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var greetingCommunicationFeignClient: GreetingCommunicationFeignClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var softeerApiClient: SofteerApiClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    @Qualifier("s3AsyncClient")
+    lateinit var s3AsyncClient: S3AsyncClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    @Qualifier("s3AsyncClientForDocumentDownload")
+    lateinit var s3AsyncClientForDocumentDownload: S3AsyncClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    @Qualifier("webClient")
+    lateinit var webClient: WebClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    @Qualifier("redirectUrlAllowWebClient")
+    lateinit var redirectUrlAllowWebClient: WebClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    @Qualifier("longTimeWebClient")
+    lateinit var longTimeWebClient: WebClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    @Qualifier("orpWebClient")
+    lateinit var orpWebClient: WebClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var cryptoService: CryptoService
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var secretsManagerClient: SecretsManagerClient
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var s3Client: S3Client
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var s3Executor: S3Executor
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var tracer: Tracer
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var meetingApplicantInternalController: MeetingApplicantInternalController
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var workspaceCareerPageReader: WorkspaceCareerPageReader
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var postStore: PostStore
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var applicationContext: ApplicationContext
+
+    @BeforeEach
+    fun baseSetUp() {
+        TestContainers.cleanDatabase()
+        TestContainers.resetMongo()
+        TestContainers.resetRedis()
+        MockResetHelper.resetAllMocks(applicationContext)
+    }
+}

+    private fun createBaseTestData(
+        requireAuthentication: Boolean = false,

+        val workspaceContext = testFixtureFactory.createWorkspaceContext()
+
+        val opening = openingRepository.save(

+                this.duplicateMonth = duplicateMonth
+                this.status = openingStatus
+            }
+        ).toAtsDomain()
+        val openingId = opening.id
+
+        openingSettingRepository.save(
+            OpeningSettingEntity(
+                openingId = openingId,
+                privateBetweenProcess = false,
+                enableEmployeeReferral = false,
+                requireAuthentication = requireAuthentication,
+                readOtherEvaluationContent = null,
+                canEditSubmittedApplication = false,
+                submittedApplicationEditDueDate = null,
+                applicationTabOrder = ApplicationTabType.DEFAULT_ORDER,
+            )
+        )
+
+        processesOnOpeningRepository.save(
+            ProcessesOnOpening(
+                openingId = openingId,
+                name = "서류 전형",
+                procedure = 0,
+                active = true,
+                scoreCriteria = 0,
+            )
+        )
+
+        val applicationFormSnapshotKey = UUID.randomUUID()
+        applicationFormSnapshotRepository.save(
+            ApplicationFormSnapshotEntity(
+                snapshotKey = applicationFormSnapshotKey,
+                applicationFormId = 1L,
+                contents = ApplicationForm(
+                    id = 0L,
+                    type = ApplicationFormType.OPENING,
+                    guideLine = null,
+                    latestSnapshotKey = null,
+                    categories = mutableListOf(),
+                    createdBy = 1,
+                    updatedBy = 1,
+                    createdAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+                    updatedAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+                ),
+            )
+        )
+
+        val applyConfigSnapshotKey = ObjectId.get().toHexString()
+        applyConfigSnapshotRepository.save(
+            ApplyConfigSnapshotEntity(
+                id = ObjectId(applyConfigSnapshotKey),
+                openingId = openingId.toLong(),
+                copiedFrom = null,
+                createdAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+                updatedAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+                applicationFormSnapshotKey = applicationFormSnapshotKey.toString(),
+            )
+        )
+
+        atsApplicantConfigurationRepository.save(
+            AtsApplicantConfigurationEntity(
+                workspaceId = workspaceContext.workspaceIdLong,
+                applicantExpireAfterNDays = 1095,
+                createdAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+                updatedAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+            )
+        )
+
+        val personalRequiredTerm = termRepository.save(
+            Term(
+                id = 0L,
+                workspaceId = workspaceContext.workspaceIdLong,
+                type = TermType.PERSONAL_REQUIRED,
+                isRequired = true,
+                isActive = true,
+                isGreetingSupport = false,
+                termContents = emptySet(),
+                createdAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+                updatedAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+            )
+        )
+
+        val thirdPartyTermId = if (createThirdPartyTerm) {
+            termRepository.save(
+                Term(
+                    id = 0L,
+                    workspaceId = workspaceContext.workspaceIdLong,
+                    type = TermType.THIRD_PARTY,
+                    isRequired = false,
+                    isActive = true,
+                    isGreetingSupport = false,
+                    termContents = emptySet(),
+                    createdAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+                    updatedAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+                )
+            ).id
+        } else {
+            null
+        }
+
+        return TestDataContext(
+            workspaceId = workspaceContext.workspaceId,
+            workspaceIdLong = workspaceContext.workspaceIdLong,
+            openingId = openingId,
+            applicationFormSnapshotKey = applicationFormSnapshotKey,
+            applyConfigSnapshotKey = applyConfigSnapshotKey,
+            personalRequiredTermId = personalRequiredTerm.id,
+            thirdPartyTermId = thirdPartyTermId,
+        )
+    }

+                applicantsServiceImpl.updateApplicantProcess(
+                    ApplicantsServiceCommand.UpdateApplicantProcess(
+                        workspaceId = workspaceContext.workspaceId,
+                        openingId = opening.id,
+                        processOnOpeningId = p2.id,
+                        applicantId = applicant.id,
+                        userId = workspaceContext.ownerUserId,
+                    )
+                )
+
+                Then("Step 4: processOnOpeningId가 1차면접 ID, status는 SUBMIT") {
+                    val refreshed = applicantJpaRepository.findById(applicant.id).get()
+                    refreshed.processOnOpeningId shouldBe p2.id
+                    refreshed.status shouldBe ApplicantStatus.SUBMIT
+                }
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    private fun createThreeProcesses(openingId: Int): Triple<ProcessesOnOpening, ProcessesOnOpening, ProcessesOnOpening> {
+        val p1 = processesOnOpeningRepository.save(
+            ProcessesOnOpening(openingId = openingId, name = "서류전형", procedure = 0, active = true, scoreCriteria = 0)
+        )
+        val p2 = processesOnOpeningRepository.save(
+            ProcessesOnOpening(openingId = openingId, name = "1차면접", procedure = 1, active = true, scoreCriteria = 0)
+        )
+        val p3 = processesOnOpeningRepository.save(
+            ProcessesOnOpening(openingId = openingId, name = "최종검토", procedure = 2, active = true, scoreCriteria = 0)
+        )
+        return Triple(p1, p2, p3)
+    }
+
+    private fun createApplicant(
+        openingId: Int,
+        processOnOpeningId: Int,
+        status: ApplicantStatus = ApplicantStatus.SUBMIT,
+        passDate: ZonedDateTime? = null,
+        rejectDetail: String? = null,
+    ): ApplicantEntity {
+        return applicantJpaRepository.save(
+            ApplicantEntity(
+                openingId = openingId,
+                processOnOpeningId = processOnOpeningId,
+                status = status,
+                name = "테스트 지원자",
+                email = "test@example.com",
+                scoreCount = 0,
+                isLock = false,
+                passDate = passDate,
+                rejectDetail = rejectDetail,
+                rejectDate = if (status == ApplicantStatus.REJECT) ZonedDateTime.now() else null,
+                applyConfigSnapshotKey = null,
+                applicationFormSnapshotKey = null,
+            )
+        )
+    }
+
+    private fun createOpeningSetting(openingId: Int): OpeningSettingEntity {
+        return openingSettingRepository.save(
+            OpeningSettingEntity(
+                openingId = openingId,
+                privateBetweenProcess = false,
+                enableEmployeeReferral = false,
+                requireAuthentication = false,
+                readOtherEvaluationContent = false,
+                submittedApplicationEditDueDate = null,
+                applicationTabOrder = emptyList(),
+            )
+        )
+    }
+}

+package doodlin.greeting.common.config
+
+import org.mockito.Mockito
+import org.springframework.context.ApplicationContext
+
+/**
+ * 통합 테스트에서 [IntegrationTestMockConfig]에 정의된 모든 Mock Bean을 리셋하는 유틸리티.
+ * BaseIntegrationTest / BaseJunitIntegrationTest 등에서 중복되던 resetAllMocks() 로직을 중앙화한다.
+ */
+object MockResetHelper {
+    fun resetAllMocks(applicationContext: ApplicationContext) {
+        val mockConfig = applicationContext.getBean(IntegrationTestMockConfig::class.java)
+        Mockito.reset(*mockConfig.allMocks().toTypedArray())
+    }
+}

+            }

+    }
+
+    private fun buildCriteriaInputItems(count: Int): List<SetAiScreeningSettingInput.CriteriaItem> {
+        return (1..count).map { index ->
+            val type = if (index % 2 == 1) CriteriaType.PREFERRED else CriteriaType.NON_PREFERRED
+            SetAiScreeningSettingInput.CriteriaItem(
+                criteria = "평가기준$index",
+                criteriaType = type,
+                order = index
+            )
+        }
+    }
+
+    private fun buildCriteriaInputItemsWithLongText(count: Int, longIndex: Int, length: Int): List<SetAiScreeningSettingInput.CriteriaItem> {
+        return (1..count).map { index ->
+            val criteria = if (index == longIndex) "가".repeat(length) else "평가기준$index"
+            SetAiScreeningSettingInput.CriteriaItem(
+                criteria = criteria,
+                criteriaType = CriteriaType.PREFERRED,
+                order = index
+            )
+        }
+    }
+
+    private fun setupDefaultMocks(workspaceId: Int, openingId: Int, userId: Int, opening: Opening) {
+        whenever(
+            workspaceLaboratoryService.existWorkspaceLaboratoryFunction(
+                workspaceId = eq(workspaceId),
+                workspaceLaboratoryFunction = eq(WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction.AI_SCREENING)
+            )
+        ).thenReturn(true)
+
+        doNothing().whenever(checkOpeningPermissionService).execute(any<CheckRequestOpeningPermissionCommand>())
+
+        whenever(recruiterReader.getOpeningRecruiterOrNull(openingId = any(), userId = any())).thenReturn(
+            Recruiter(
+                userId = userId,
+                openingId = openingId,
+                alert = false,
+                authority = RecruiterRole.ROLE_MANAGER,
+                sectionId = null,
+                bookmark = false,
+                openingRoleId = 0,
+                roleId = 0L
+            )
+        )
+
+        whenever(accessibleApplicantRepository.existsByUserIdAndApplicantId(any(), any())).thenReturn(true)
+
+        whenever(openingReader.getOpening(openingId)).thenReturn(opening)
+        whenever(openingReader.findOpening(openingId)).thenReturn(opening)
+    }
+
+    private fun createSettingWithCriteria(
+        openingId: Int,
+        activation: Boolean,
+        criteriaCount: Int,
+        version: Int = 1
+    ): AiScreeningSetting {
+        val setting = aiScreeningSettingRepository.save(
+            AiScreeningSetting(
+                id = 0,
+                activation = activation,
+                openingId = openingId,
+                version = version
+            )
+        )
+        val criteriaItems = (1..criteriaCount).map { index ->
+            AiScreeningCriteriaItem.init(
+                criteria = "기준$index",
+                criteriaType = if (index % 2 == 1) CriteriaType.PREFERRED else CriteriaType.NON_PREFERRED,
+                order = index,
+                aiScreeningSetting = setting
+            )
+        }
+        aiScreeningCriteriaItemRepository.saveAll(criteriaItems)
+        return setting
+    }
+
+    private fun createSettingHistory(
+        setting: AiScreeningSetting,
+        userId: Int,
+        criteriaItems: List<AiScreeningCriteriaItem>? = null
+    ): AiScreeningSettingHistory {
+        val items = criteriaItems ?: aiScreeningCriteriaItemRepository.findAllByAiScreeningSettingId(setting.id)
+        return aiScreeningSettingHistoryRepository.save(
+            AiScreeningSettingHistory.init(
+                updateUser = userId,
+                aiScreeningSetting = setting,
+                aiScreeningCriteriaItems = items
+            )
+        )
+    }
+
+    private fun createResultWithStatus(
+        applicantId: Int,
+        version: Int,
+        status: AiScreeningResultStatus,
+        settingId: Long,
+        historyId: Long,
+        latest: Boolean = true
+    ): AiScreeningResult {
+        val result = aiScreeningResultRepository.save(
+            AiScreeningResult(
+                id = 0,
+                score = if (status == AiScreeningResultStatus.COMPLETED) 85 else null,
+                strengthSummary = if (status == AiScreeningResultStatus.COMPLETED) "강점 요약" else null,
+                weaknessSummaries = if (status == AiScreeningResultStatus.COMPLETED) listOf("약점1") else emptyList(),
+                preferredMetList = if (status == AiScreeningResultStatus.COMPLETED) listOf(PreferredMetProperty("요구사항", "이유")) else emptyList(),
+                nonPreferredMetList = if (status == AiScreeningResultStatus.COMPLETED) listOf(PreferredMetProperty("비선호요구", "비선호이유")) else emptyList(),
+                retryCount = 0,
+                status = status,
+                applicantId = applicantId,
+                latest = latest,
+                version = version,
+                aiScreeningSettingId = settingId,
+                aiScreeningSettingHistoryId = historyId,
+                createdAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+                updatedAt = ZonedDateTime.now()
+            )
+        )
+        return result
+    }
+}

+                val command = CreateEvaluationContentCommand(

+                    workspaceId = workspaceId,
+                    openingId = openingId,
+                    processId = processId,
+                    applicantId = applicantId,
+                    evaluationId = evaluation.id,
+                    evaluationContent = EvaluationContentProperty(
+                        score = 4,
+                        scoreText = "우수",
+                        comment = "당일면접 평가",
+                        privateEvaluation = false,

+                    evaluationContentItems = emptyList(),
+                )

+                evaluationContentService.createEvaluationContentForOneDayInterview(command)

+                        processId = processId,
+                    )
+                    savedContents shouldHaveSize 1
+
+                    val savedContent = savedContents.first()
+                    savedContent.userId shouldBe evaluatorUserId
+                    savedContent.score shouldBe 4
+                    savedContent.comment shouldBe "당일면접 평가"

+                    updatedEvaluation.finalScore shouldBe 4
+                    updatedEvaluation.evaluationStatus shouldBe EvaluationStatus.COMPLETE
+                }

+    }
+
+    private fun setupPermissionsGranted() {
+        doNothing().whenever(checkApplicantPermissionUseCase)
+            .execute(any<CheckRequestApplicantPermissionCommand>())
+        whenever(checkApplicantPermissionUseCase.execute(any<HasApplicantPermissionCommand>()))
+            .thenReturn(true)
+    }
+
+    private fun setupReadApplicantPermissionDenied() {
+        whenever(checkApplicantPermissionUseCase.execute(any<CheckRequestApplicantPermissionCommand>()))
+            .thenThrow(ForbiddenException("지원자 읽기 권한이 없습니다."))
+    }
+
+    private fun setupPrivateEvaluationPermissionDenied() {
+        doNothing().whenever(checkApplicantPermissionUseCase)
+            .execute(any<CheckRequestApplicantPermissionCommand>())
+        whenever(checkApplicantPermissionUseCase.execute(any<HasApplicantPermissionCommand>()))
+            .thenReturn(false)
+    }
+
+    private fun setupDeletePermissionGranted() {
+        doNothing().whenever(checkApplicantPermissionUseCase)
+            .execute(any<CheckRequestApplicantPermissionCommand>())
+        whenever(checkApplicantPermissionUseCase.execute(any<HasApplicantPermissionCommand>()))
+            .thenReturn(true)
+    }
+
+    private fun setupDeletePermissionDenied() {
+        doNothing().whenever(checkApplicantPermissionUseCase)
+            .execute(any<CheckRequestApplicantPermissionCommand>())
+        whenever(checkApplicantPermissionUseCase.execute(any<HasApplicantPermissionCommand>()))
+            .thenReturn(false)
+    }
+
+    private fun defaultStep5Options(): List<EvaluationOption> {
+        return listOf(
+            EvaluationOption(score = 1, scoreText = "매우 부족", order = 0),
+            EvaluationOption(score = 2, scoreText = "부족", order = 1),
+            EvaluationOption(score = 3, scoreText = "보통", order = 2),
+            EvaluationOption(score = 4, scoreText = "우수", order = 3),
+            EvaluationOption(score = 5, scoreText = "매우 우수", order = 4),
+        )
+    }
+
+    private fun createEvaluationModule(
+        processId: Int,
+        calculationType: EvaluationScoreCalculationType = EvaluationScoreCalculationType.MANUAL,
+        totalScoreType: EvaluationScoreType = EvaluationScoreType.STEP5,
+        privateEvaluation: Boolean = false,
+        evaluatorUserIds: List<Int> = emptyList(),
+    ): EvaluationModule {
+        val module = EvaluationModule(
+            processId = processId,
+            notice = "평가 안내",
+            name = "테스트 평가표",
+            totalScoreType = totalScoreType,
+            scoreShowType = EvaluationScoreShowType.SCORE_TEXT,
+            totalScoreShowType = EvaluationScoreShowType.SCORE_TEXT,
+            evaluationOptions = defaultStep5Options(),
+            scoreCriteria = DEFAULT_SCORE_CRITERIA,
+            calculationType = calculationType,
+            privateEvaluation = privateEvaluation,
+            autoSyncEvaluators = true,
+            revision = 1,
+            papers = mutableListOf(),
+            evaluators = mutableListOf(),
+            revisions = mutableListOf(),
+            createdAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+            updatedAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+            deletedAt = null,
+        )
+        module.addEvaluators(evaluatorUserIds)
+        return evaluationModuleJpaRepository.save(module)
+    }
+
+    private fun createRevision(
+        evaluationModule: EvaluationModule,
+        papers: List<EvaluationPaperRevisionHistory> = emptyList(),
+        evaluatorUserIds: List<Int> = emptyList(),
+    ): EvaluationModuleRevision {
+        val evaluatorHistories = evaluatorUserIds.mapIndexed { index, userId ->
+            EvaluatorRevisionHistory(
+                id = index.toLong() + 1,
+                processOnOpeningId = evaluationModule.processId,
+                userId = userId,
+                evaluationModuleId = evaluationModule.id,
+                createdAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+                updatedAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+                deletedAt = null,
+            )
+        }
+
+        val revision = EvaluationModuleRevision(
+            history = EvaluationModuleRevisionHistory(
+                id = evaluationModule.id,
+                processId = evaluationModule.processId,
+                notice = evaluationModule.notice,
+                name = evaluationModule.name,
+                totalScoreType = evaluationModule.totalScoreType,
+                scoreShowType = evaluationModule.scoreShowType,
+                totalScoreShowType = evaluationModule.totalScoreShowType,
+                evaluationOptions = evaluationModule.evaluationOptions,
+                scoreCriteria = evaluationModule.scoreCriteria,
+                calculationType = evaluationModule.calculationType,
+                privateEvaluation = evaluationModule.privateEvaluation,
+                revision = evaluationModule.revision,
+                papers = papers,
+                evaluators = evaluatorHistories,
+                createdAt = evaluationModule.createdAt,
+                updatedAt = evaluationModule.updatedAt,
+                deletedAt = null,
+            ),
+            evaluationModule = evaluationModule,
+            revision = evaluationModule.revision,
+            createdAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+            updatedAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+        )
+
+        return evaluationModuleRevisionJpaRepository.save(revision)
+    }
+
+    private fun createEvaluation(
+        evaluationModuleId: Long,
+        evaluationModuleRevisionId: Long,
+        applicantId: Int,
+        processId: Int,
+        assignedEvaluatorUserIds: List<Int>,
+    ): Evaluation {
+        val evaluation = Evaluation(
+            evaluationModuleId = evaluationModuleId,
+            evaluationModuleRevisionId = evaluationModuleRevisionId,
+            applicantId = applicantId,
+            processId = processId,
+            finalScore = null,
+            evaluationStatus = EvaluationStatus.NOT_EVALUATE,
+            evaluationState = EvaluationState.ACTIVE,
+            createdAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+            updatedAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+            assignedEvaluatorUserIds = emptyList(),
+            deletedAt = null,
+        )
+        evaluation.addAssignedEvaluatorTeam(assignedEvaluatorUserIds)
+        return evaluationJpaRepository.save(evaluation)
+    }
+
+    private fun defaultPaperRevisionHistory(
+        processId: Int,
+        order: Int = 0,
+        name: String = "기술 역량",
+        evaluationModuleId: Long,
+        scoreType: EvaluationScoreType = EvaluationScoreType.STEP5,

+    ): EvaluationPaperRevisionHistory {
+        return EvaluationPaperRevisionHistory(
+            processOnOpeningId = processId,
+            order = order,
+            useComment = true,
+            name = name,
+            notice = null,
+            scoreType = scoreType,
+            scoreShowType = EvaluationScoreShowType.SCORE_TEXT,
+            evaluationOptions = defaultStep5Options(),
+            scoreCriteria = DEFAULT_SCORE_CRITERIA,
+            evaluationWeight = evaluationWeight,
+            evaluationModuleId = evaluationModuleId,
+            createdAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+            updatedAt = ZonedDateTime.now(),
+        )
+    }

+                status = status,

+            )

+            val context = testFixtureFactory.createWorkspaceContext()
+
+            When("로그인 필수 옵션을 켜고 전체 지원서 양식으로 공고를 생성하면") {
+                val input = generateFullInput(context, requireAuthentication = true)
+                val now = ZonedDateTime.now(ZoneOffset.UTC)
+                val createResult = openingFacade.createOpeningV5(input)
+
+                val recruiters = openingFacade.getRecruitersBy(createResult.openingId)
+                roleFacade.rebalanceRoles(

+                        actions = listOf(
+                            RebalanceRoleInput.Action(
+                                actionType = RebalanceRoleInput.ActionType.ASSIGN,
+                                recruiters = recruiters,

+                        workspaceId = context.workspaceIdLong,
+                    )
+                )

+                Then("응답에 openingId, magicLink, snapshotKey가 포함된다") {
+                    createResult.openingId.shouldBePositive()
+                    createResult.magicLink shouldBe "test-company/o/${createResult.openingId}"
+                    createResult.applyConfigSnapshotKey.shouldNotBeNull()
+                    createResult.applicationFormSnapshotKey.shouldNotBeNull()
+                }
+
+                Then("Openings 1건이 올바르게 생성된다") {
+                    val opening = openingsRepository.findById(createResult.openingId).get()
+                    opening.workspaceId shouldBe context.workspaceId
+                    opening.title shouldBe "서버 개발자 채용"
+                    opening.detail shouldBe "서버 개발자를 모집합니다"
+                    opening.status shouldBe OpeningsStatus.OPEN
+                    opening.deploy shouldBe true
+                    opening.isLock shouldBe false
+                    opening.duplicateMonth shouldBe DuplicatedApplicantRemoval.entries.first { it.month == 1 }
+                    opening.dueDate!!.toInstant()
+                        .shouldBeCloseTo(input.initOpening.dueDate!!.toInstant(), 1.seconds)
+                    opening.openDate!!.toInstant().shouldBeCloseTo(now.toInstant(), 3.seconds)
+                    opening.job shouldBe "직무 테스트"
+                    opening.employmentType shouldBe EmploymentType.FULL_TIME_WORKER
+                    opening.place shouldBe "장소 테스트"
+                    opening.detailPlace shouldBe "상세 장소 테스트"
+                    opening.placeId shouldBe "10"
+                    opening.workFromHome shouldBe true
+                    opening.commonResumeApplicantOption shouldBe false
+                    opening.commonResumeQuestionnaireOption shouldBe false
+                    opening.subsidiary shouldBe "구분"
+                    opening.workspaceDivisionId shouldBe context.workspaceDivision.id
+                    opening.useApplicationForm shouldBe true
+                    opening.createDate.toInstant()
+                        .shouldBeCloseTo(now.toInstant(), 1.seconds)
+                }
+
+                Then("OpeningJobPositionSetting 1건과 관련 테이블이 생성된다") {
+                    val jpSettings = openingJobPositionSettingRepository.findAll()
+                        .filter { it.openingId == createResult.openingId }
+                    jpSettings shouldHaveSize 1
+                    jpSettings[0].maxPriority shouldBe 1
+                }
+
+                Then("CareerInfoOnOpening 1건이 생성된다") {
+                    val careerInfos = careerInfoOnOpeningRepository.findAll()
+                        .filter { it.openingId == createResult.openingId }
+                    careerInfos shouldHaveSize 1
+                    careerInfos[0].careerType shouldBe CareerInfoOnOpeningCareerType.NOT_MATTER
+                    careerInfos[0].careerFrom.shouldBeNull()
+                    careerInfos[0].careerTo.shouldBeNull()
+                }
+
+                Then("ApplicationForm 1건이 올바르게 생성된다") {
+                    val forms = applicationFormRepository.findAll()
+                    forms shouldHaveSize 1
+                    val form = forms[0]
+                    form.guideLine shouldBe "지원서 가이드라인"
+                    form.guideLineEn shouldBe "applicant guideLine"
+                    form.useGuideLine shouldBe true
+                }
+
+                Then("ApplicationFormCategory 11건이 전수 생성된다") {
+                    val categories = applicationFormCategoryRepository.findAll()
+                    categories shouldHaveSize 11
+
+                    val sortedCategories = categories.sortedBy { it.sortOrder }
+                    sortedCategories[0].categoryType.name shouldBe "BASIC_INFORMATION"
+                    sortedCategories[0].isActive shouldBe true
+                    sortedCategories[1].categoryType.name shouldBe "PERSONAL_INFORMATION"
+                    sortedCategories[1].isActive shouldBe true
+                    sortedCategories[2].categoryType.name shouldBe "PHYSICAL_INFORMATION"
+                    sortedCategories[2].isActive shouldBe false
+                    sortedCategories[3].categoryType.name shouldBe "MILITARY_SERVICE_PREFERENTIAL_EMPLOYMENT_STATUS"
+                    sortedCategories[3].isActive shouldBe true
+                    sortedCategories[4].categoryType.name shouldBe "EDUCATIONAL_BACKGROUND"
+                    sortedCategories[4].isActive shouldBe true
+                    sortedCategories[5].categoryType.name shouldBe "WORK_HISTORY"
+                    sortedCategories[5].isActive shouldBe true
+                    sortedCategories[6].categoryType.name shouldBe "LANGUAGES_CERTIFICATES_AND_OTHER_ACTIVITIES"
+                    sortedCategories[6].isActive shouldBe true
+                    sortedCategories[7].categoryType.name shouldBe "APPLICATION_DOCUMENTS"
+                    sortedCategories[7].isActive shouldBe true
+                    sortedCategories[8].categoryType.name shouldBe "COVER_LETTER"
+                    sortedCategories[8].isActive shouldBe true
+                    sortedCategories[9].categoryType.name shouldBe "ADDITIONAL_QUESTIONS"

+                    sortedCategories[10].categoryType.name shouldBe "APPLICATION_DETAILS"

+                    val sortedProcesses = processes.sortedBy { it.procedure }

+                    remindSettings shouldHaveSize 4

+                    remindSettings.forEach { setting ->

+                    processIds.forEach { processId ->

+                        evaluatorUserIds shouldContainExactlyInAnyOrder listOf(
+                            context.ownerUserId, context.managerUserId, context.generalUserId

+                    }

+                    recruitersByUserId[context.managerUserId]!!.authority shouldBe RecruiterRole.ROLE_MANAGER

+                    settingEvent.after!!.requireAuthentication shouldBe true
+                    settingEvent.before!!.privateBetweenProcess shouldBe false
+                    settingEvent.after!!.privateBetweenProcess shouldBe false
+                    settingEvent.before!!.enableEmployeeReferral shouldBe false
+                    settingEvent.after!!.enableEmployeeReferral shouldBe false

+            }

+    }

+    private fun generateCreateInput(context: WorkspaceTestContext): OpeningCommand.OpeningV5 {
+        return OpeningCommandFixture.defaultOpeningV5(

+            workspaceId = context.workspaceId,
+            recruiters = listOf(
+                RecruiterInfo(
+                    authority = RecruiterRole.ROLE_MANAGER.name,
+                    userId = context.ownerUserId,
+                    roleId = context.managerRole.id
+                ),
+                RecruiterInfo(
+                    authority = RecruiterRole.ROLE_MANAGER.name,
+                    userId = context.managerUserId,
+                    roleId = context.managerRole.id
+                ),
+                RecruiterInfo(
+                    authority = RecruiterRole.ROLE_GENERAL.name,
+                    userId = context.generalUserId,
+                    roleId = context.generalRole.id
+                )
+            ),
+            workspaceDivisionId = context.workspaceDivision.id,
+            jobPositionSetting = OpeningCommandFixture.defaultOpeningJobPositionSetting(
+                workspaceFieldId = context.workspaceField.id,
+                workspaceOccupationId = context.workspaceOccupation.id,
+                workspaceJobId = context.workspaceJob.id,
+                workspacePlaceId = context.workspacePlace.id,
+            )
+        )
+    }
+
+    private fun buildUpdateInput(
+        context: WorkspaceTestContext,
+        openingId: Int,
+        openingDetail: GetOpeningDetailResult,
+        createInput: OpeningCommand.OpeningV5,
+    ): OpeningCommand.OpeningV5 {
+        val existingForm = applicationFormService.getApplicationForm(openingId = openingId, includeDeleted = true)
+
+        val updatedCategories = existingForm.categories.map { category ->
+            val shouldDeactivate = category.categoryType == ApplicationFormCategoryType.PERSONAL_INFORMATION ||
+                category.categoryType == ApplicationFormCategoryType.EDUCATIONAL_BACKGROUND
+
+            val categoryActive = if (shouldDeactivate) false else category.isActive
+            ApplicationFormUpsertCommand.Category(
+                id = category.id,
+                categoryType = category.categoryType,
+                title = category.title,
+                sortOrder = category.sortOrder,
+                isActive = categoryActive,
+                components = category.components.map { component ->
+                    ApplicationFormUpsertCommand.Component(
+                        id = component.id,
+                        componentType = component.componentType,
+                        title = component.title,
+                        sortOrder = component.sortOrder,
+                        isRequired = component.isRequired,
+                        isActive = if (shouldDeactivate) false else component.isActive,
+                        guideLine = component.guideLine,
+                        attributes = component.attributes.map { attribute ->
+                            ApplicationFormUpsertCommand.Attribute(
+                                id = attribute.id,
+                                title = attribute.title,
+                                attributeType = attribute.attributeType,
+                                dateType = attribute.dateType,
+                                defaultCountryCode = attribute.defaultCountryCode,
+                                defaultPhoneCountryCode = attribute.defaultPhoneCountryCode,
+                                maximumLength = attribute.maximumLength,
+                                useCompanyPolicy = attribute.useCompanyPolicy,
+                                isAllowUrl = attribute.isAllowUrl,
+                                guideFile = null,
+                                isCustomInput = attribute.isCustomInput,
+                                optionList = attribute.optionList,
+                                isRequired = attribute.isRequired,
+                                isActive = if (shouldDeactivate) false else attribute.isActive,
+                                sortOrder = attribute.sortOrder,
+                                visibility = attribute.visibility,
+                            )
+                        }
+                    )
+                }
+            )
+        }
+
+        val updatedProcesses = openingDetail.consistOfProcesses.map { process ->
+            ConsistOfProcess(
+                processId = process.processId,
+                icon = process.icon,
+                name = process.name,
+                evaluationRemindSetting = EvaluationRemindSettingRequest(
+                    enableRemind = process.evaluationRemindSetting.enableRemind,
+                    remindAfterNDays = process.evaluationRemindSetting.remindAfterNDays,
+                    remindTime = process.evaluationRemindSetting.remindTime,
+                ),
+                evaluationModules = process.evaluationModules.map { module ->
+                    EvaluationModule(
+                        id = module.id,
+                        name = module.name,
+                        notice = module.notice,
+                        privateEvaluation = module.privateEvaluation,
+                        totalScoreType = EvaluationScoreType.valueOf(module.totalScoreType.name),
+                        scoreShowType = EvaluationScoreShowType.valueOf(module.scoreShowType.name),
+                        totalScoreShowType = EvaluationScoreShowType.valueOf(module.totalScoreShowType.name),
+                        evaluationOptions = module.evaluationOptions.map { opt ->
+                            OpeningCommand.EvaluationOption(
+                                score = opt.score,
+                                scoreText = opt.scoreText,
+                                order = opt.order
+                            )
+                        },
+                        evaluatorIds = module.evaluatorIds,
+                        scoreCalculationType = EvaluationScoreCalculationType.valueOf(module.scoreCalculationType.name),
+                        evaluationPapers = module.evaluationPapers.map { paper ->
+                            EvaluationModule.EvaluationPaper(
+                                name = paper.name,
+                                notice = paper.notice,
+                                scoreType = paper.scoreType?.let { EvaluationScoreType.valueOf(it.name) },
+                                useComment = paper.useComment,
+                                scoreShowType = EvaluationScoreShowType.valueOf(paper.scoreShowType.name),
+                                evaluationOptions = paper.evaluationOptions.map { opt ->
+                                    OpeningCommand.EvaluationOption(
+                                        score = opt.score,
+                                        scoreText = opt.scoreText,
+                                        order = opt.order
+                                    )
+                                },
+                                evaluationWeight = paper.evaluationWeight,
+                            )
+                        },
+                        autoSyncEvaluators = module.autoSyncEvaluators,
+                    )
+                }
+            )
+        }
+
+        return OpeningCommand.OpeningV5(
+            id = openingId,
+            userId = context.ownerUserId,
+            workspaceId = context.workspaceId,
+            consistOfProcesses = updatedProcesses,
+            consistOfRecruiters = createInput.consistOfRecruiters,
+            additionalSetting = AdditionalSetting(
+                isLock = false,
+                duplicateRemovalApplicant = 1,
+                emailVariable = "email variable",
+                useApplyingEmail = true,
+                isDeploy = true,
+                status = OpeningsStatus.OPEN,
+                requireAuthentication = true,
+                isPrivateBetweenProcess = false,
+                enableEmployeeReferral = false,
+                readOtherEvaluationContent = true,
+                canEditSubmittedApplication = false,
+            ),
+            initOpening = createInput.initOpening,
+            applicationForm = ApplicationFormUpsertCommand.ApplicationForm(
+                id = existingForm.id,
+                guideLine = existingForm.guideLine,
+                useGuideLine = existingForm.useGuideLine,
+                latestSnapshotKey = existingForm.latestSnapshotKey,
+                categories = updatedCategories,
+            ),
+        )
+    }
+}
